theme: build the lock that only real keys visit
title: The Lock Only Real Keys Visit: Minimum-Gate Circuit on a Partial Truth Table
strategies: affine-oblivious per-monomial Reed-Muller circuit in free coordinates (trivial/baseline)
shared-variable factoring of the quadratic part (greedy) -- one AND per variable
detect the affine flat, collapse to symplectic normal form -> rank/2 AND gates (strong)
further linear-form sharing / sub-rank multiplicative complexity below the symplectic reference (open ceiling, uncovered)
